src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and braces from the annotation interface definition.
Rename the static logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to align with JHipster coding standards.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to leverage Java 10+ features.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log messages to Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to clean up the log statement arguments.
Adjust indentation and line breaks in Optional chains and log statements for consistent formatting.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut expressions for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logger.error statements for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved arguments of logger.error() to new lines with adjusted indentation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace ternary null check with String.valueOf to handle potential null cause safely and concisely.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable initialization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Update import statement to reflect the package restructuring of MongoAutoConfiguration in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Update the method signature to throw JacksonException instead of JsonProcessingException to match the new library API.
Replace explicit String type with var for local variable declaration to modernize code style.
Replace explicit JHipsterProperties.Logging types with var for local variable declarations to modernize code style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: var loggingProperties = jHipsterProperties.getLogging(); var logstashProperties = loggingProperties.getLogstash();

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove @EnableWebSecurity annotation which is no longer required in Spring Security 6+ as it is enabled by default.
Update HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda DSL and withDefaults() for CORS, required for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
Refactor frameOptions configuration to use the new FrameOptionsConfig functional interface style.
Rename permissionsPolicy method to permissionsPolicyHeader to align with Spring Security 6 API changes.
Update oauth2ResourceServer configuration to use jwt(withDefaults()) for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
Adjust permitted static resource patterns to include .txt and .json files and remove root path from explicit permit list.
Removed the unused static import for AUTHORITIES_KEY as it is no longer referenced in the class.
Added SLF4J logger imports and field to enable logging of unexpected JWT errors.
Removed imports for JwtAuthenticationConverter and JwtGrantedAuthoritiesConverter which are no longer used after bean removal.
Expanded the condition for tracking malformed tokens to include 'Malformed token' messages and added a fallback error log for unknown JWT errors.
Removed the jwtAuthenticationConverter bean, likely because Spring Security 6+ handles JWT authority conversion differently or automatically.
Replace verbose array instantiation with concise array initializer syntax.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed `new String[] { ... }` to `{ ... }` for RESOURCE_LOCATIONS and RESOURCE_PATHS.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory to the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Remove unused imports that are no longer needed after code refactoring.
Add import for the Path class to replace the deprecated Paths utility usage.
Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming conventions.
Remove throws ServletException from onStartup to match the ServletContextInitializer interface signature in newer Jakarta EE versions.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for resolving root path.
